title: LPC MiniMessage X Configuration
description: JSON Schema for LPC MiniMessage X config.yml

chat-format.description: The default chat format. Supports MiniMessage formatting (including <gradient:color1:color2> and <rainbow> tags) and placeholders: %prefix%/<prefix>, %suffix%/<suffix>, %prefixes%/<prefixes>, %suffixes%/<suffixes>, %world%/<world>, %name%/<name>, %displayname%/<displayname>, %username-color%/<username-color>, %message-color%/<message-color>, %message%/<message>, [item], %balance%/<balance>, %balance-formatted%/<balance-formatted>, %player-health%/<player-health>, %player-level%/<player-level>, %world-time%/<world-time>, %player-uuid%/<player-uuid>

group-formats.description: Per-group chat format overrides. Format is group-name: format-string

additionalProperties.description: Chat format for the group. Same placeholders as chat-format are supported.

track-formats.description: Per-track chat format overrides. Track must exist in LuckPerms. Group formats take priority over track formats.

additionalProperties.description: Chat format for the track. Same placeholders as chat-format are supported.

use-item-placeholder.description: Enable the [item] placeholder that shows the item in hand with hover info.

reload-message.description: Message shown when config is reloaded using /lpc reload. Supports MiniMessage formatting.
